creator: gouders@et.bocholt.fh-ge.de
text:
The port DAP (audio) seems to require the compat3x distribution but 
doesn't mention it during installation.  Instead one gets an error 
message that the library libc.so.3 cannot be found if she tries to 
run DAP...

Fix: 

No idea how to check if the compat3x distribution has been installed.
There should be a comment mentioning this requirement, at least.
